creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-03-16 14:57:31 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    x11-wm/awesome2      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Added files:
    x11-wm/awesome2/files patch-Makefile.in 
  Removed files:
    x11-wm/awesome2/files patch-CMakeLists.txt 
                          patch-awesomeConfig.cmake 
  Log:
  - This port reintroduces the older and somewhat static 2.x branch of the
    awesome window manager, only now as x11-wm/awesome2. The latest stable
    version (3.x) resides in x11-wm/awesome port.
  
  PR:             132137
  Submitted by:   Nikos Ntarmos <ntarmos@cs.uoi.gr>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
